title: Untouchable items in Workforms
excerpt: I am creating a workforms with pre-filled information that’s in the URL. This Pre-Filled information helps us with our workflows and automations to auto-sync submissions with current data in other boards. Unfortunately,…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating a workforms with pre-filled information that’s in the URL. This Pre-Filled information helps us with our workflows and automations to auto-sync submissions with current data in other boards.

Unfortunately, these pre-filled columns are editable. I’d like the option to make the uneditable. It’ll resolve many issues.

Thank you!

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidSchenkler

Our monday app Easyform supports URL parameters, with the option of hiding or disabling fields. Please check out our documentation here.

If you want help setting this up or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.
